commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `slugifyWikiPageStem`, routes memory-wiki synthesis and ingest direct page writes through it, and adds regression coverage for preserving `Index` pages while leaving `Log` and shared slug output unchanged.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +67. Total +77 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and latest release source map direct `Index` synthesis/source titles to page-group `index.md`, while compile/query/status treat those files as generated indexes rather than queryable user pages; I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the patch is correct and the remaining action is normal maintainer/CI handling plus optional PR-description cleanup.
